commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Added. This is an usual form of denouncing vengeance, Ruth i. 17. The Babylonians are threatened with God's judgments, ver. 4. Some place these words in the mouth of God, answering the captives. How shall you be screened from the shafts of detraction? Fear not. The sharp (Calmet)
What punishment is great enough for this sin? (Worthington)
